name: Active IAM access key not rotated in 90 days
description: One or more active IAM access keys have not been rotated in over 90 days. Long-lived access keys are a major attack vector — a compromised key provides persistent, undetected access.
remediation: Rotate all access keys older than 90 days. Disable keys unused for 30+ days. Use IAM roles and instance profiles instead of long-term access keys where possible. Automate rotation with AWS Secrets Manager.
